title: An Act Expanding Access to Oral Health Care by Creating a New Path for Obtaining a License to Practice Dentistry
committee: Health Coverage, Insurance and Financial Services
final_disposition: Ought Not to Pass Pursuant To Joint Rule 310, Mar 10, 2026
last_house_action: 2/10/2026 - Representative MATHIESON for the Joint Standing Committee on Health Coverage, Insurance and Financial Services pursuant to Resolve 2025, chapter 107, section 8 reports that the Bill be REFERRED to the Committee on HEALTH COVERAGE, INSURANCE AND FINANCIAL SERVICES and printed pursuant to Joint Rule 218. Report was READ and ACCEPTED . The Bill was REFERRED to the Committee on HEALTH COVERAGE, INSURANCE AND FINANCIAL SERVICES Sent for concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
last_senate_action: 3/10/2026 - Pursuant to Joint Rule 310.3 Placed in Legislative Files (DEAD)

actions.description: Representative MATHIESON for the Joint Standing Committee on Health Coverage, Insurance and Financial Services pursuant to Resolve 2025, chapter 107, section 8 reports that the Bill be REFERRED to the Committee on HEALTH COVERAGE, INSURANCE AND FINANCIAL SERVICES and printed pursuant to Joint Rule 218. Report was READ and ACCEPTED . The Bill was REFERRED to the Committee on HEALTH COVERAGE, INSURANCE AND FINANCIAL SERVICES Sent for concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
